response_statistics_scope: within buffer stroke and t=60-600 s

paper_use.reason: independent stage review is still required before manuscript conclusion promotion

model_boundaries: post-stroke rigid-stop continuation is not hydraulic impact, structural strength, or safety evidence
spud-soil X displacement is relative to the fixed soil reference, not relative to the buffer trolley
bridge hinge pure reaction moment is model-imposed zero
support increment fields exclude preload; physical support totals include preload
